case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. LUIS ANTONIO SALAZAR CAMARILLO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED OCT-29-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAMARILLO, LUIS ANTONIO SALAZAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: OSCAR GARCIA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESSIVE FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESSIVE FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CAMARILLO, LUIS ANTONIO SALAZAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESSIVE FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMARILLO, LUIS ANTONIO SALAZAR $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CAMARILLO, LUIS ANTONIO SALAZAR
